chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No. D-521 of 2025 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.06.2025. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. Mr. Ahmed Bux Abro, advocate along with petitioners. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P.G. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asst. A.G., along with IO/ASI Riaz Ali Dayo of PS Hyderi, Larkana. Respondent No.5 Sumair Ali present in person. --------------------- Petitioners Mst. Dua Muskan and Sanaullah Barejo have filed instant petition, alleging harassment by the official respondents at the behest of private respondents, on the premise of having contracted unconventional marriage against the consent of their parents, and have sought protection. Today, the IO ASI Riaz Ali Dayo has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Dua Muskan and has placed its copy on record under the cover of statement of learned AAG; wherein Mst. Dua Muskan has stated that she left the house of her parents and contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 Sanaullah Barejo on 10.05.2025 out of her free-will and consent and that she has not been abducted, enticed or coerced by any one including the petitioner No.2. The IO of Crime No.68/2025 of PS Hyderi, Larkana present submits that he will file report u/s 173, Cr.P.C. before the concerned Court/Magistrate seeking disposal of the aforementioned FIR in the light of statement of petitioner No.1. In view of above, learned Counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the petition, which is disposed of accordingly. However, the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law.

In view of above, learned Counsel for the petitioners seeks disposal of the petition, which is disposed of accordingly. However, the official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE
